title: SpecAmbiguityDetectorOutput
description: Ambiguity Detector output. The agent scans SADS spec requirement and acceptance_criteria fields for vague language and emits manual_resolution_items. An empty array means no issues were found (non-blocking). Each item includes a suggested_improvement the user can accept, or they can choose 'let_agent_edit' to have spec_editor produce a rewrite.

item_id.description: Unique identifier for this resolution item (e.g. AMB-001).

title.description: Short human-readable summary of the ambiguity.

spec_id.description: Identifier of the spec row containing the vague language.

field.description: Which SADS field contains the vague language.

vague_phrases.description: Exact phrases or clauses from the field that are vague or unmeasurable.

suggested_improvement.description: Agent-proposed rewrite of the entire field with specific, measurable language.

options.description: Resolution options presented to the user.

option_id.description: accept_suggestion: apply suggested_improvement; let_agent_edit: call spec_editor for a custom rewrite; skip: leave original unchanged.

effect.description: Short description of what choosing this option does.
